titleStmt.title: SII 11.74: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 74. (B.K. No. 91 of 1928-29). MAṆṬŪR, BILGI PETHA, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A STONE SET UP IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF RĀMALIṄGA.

summary.p: The record belongs to the reign of Jagadēkamalladēva (I) who was ruling the kingdom from his capital at Hoṭṭaḷakeṟe. It mentions his subordinate the Mahāsāmanta Eṟeyamma or Eṟega who bears all the hereditary titles of the Raṭṭa family. He is stated to have made a gift of certain incomes accruing from fines etc., to the Mahājanas of Daivada Maṇṭūru and the Ūroḍeya Madhusūdanayya for digging a tank called Raṭṭasamudra in that place. Eṟega bears also the birudas Raṭṭa-Nārāyaṇa and Raṭṭa-Mārttaṇḍa.

The record is dated Śaka 962, Vikrama, Mārgaśira, śu. 5, Sunday. In Vikrama, Mārgaśira, śu. 5 was not Sunday but Tuesday. But in the following year Vishu, Mārgaśira, śu. 5 was Sunday A.D. 1041, November 1 which perhaps is the date intended.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha ma
hārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajjagadēka
malladēvar hoṭṭaḷakeṟeya nalevīḍinoḷsukhasaṁtatavi
nōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttumire sakavarṣa 962 neya vikrama
saṁvatsarada śrāheya mārggaśira suddha 5 Ādityavāradaṁdu
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantaṁ jayavadhū
kāntaṁ lattalūrppuravarēśvaraṁ pratāpalaṁkēśvaraṁ svarṇagaruḍadhvajaṁ
trivaḷepaṟeghōṣaṇaṁ raṇaraṅgabhīṣaṇaṁ raṭṭavaṁśōdbhavaṁ sendūra lāṁ
canaṁ birudarasiṅgaṁ sāmantabhujaṅgaṁ raṭṭamārttaṇḍaṁ dhaḷamuṭṭe
gaṇḍaṁ gaṇḍataḷaprahāri maṇḍaḷaṅgāvaṁ kaligaḷādityaṁ desekāṟa raḍeThe letter pra is engraved above the line.
gaṇḍaroḷpaḷivaṁ pisuṇiṁge muḷivaṁ vādya vidyādharaṁ sakaḷakaḷā
dharaṁ sarasvatīkarṇnakuṇḍaḷaṁ karppūravarṣaṁ siṅganagaruḍa nāmā
di samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāsāmanta neṟeyamma ni
ral svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyajapahōmānuṣṭhāna parā
ṇarappa deyvada maṁṭū rūroḍeya madhusūdanayya pra
kha mahājanaṁ raṭṭasamudra vanagaḷisaleṁdu paḍeda
rttamāvudendo ḍūroḷēnondu puṭṭida daṇḍāyamellaṁ keṟege
pratisiddhāyado ḷayvattu gadyāṇa po nnā caṁdrārkkatāraṁ
naḍevu di deṟega mahānripatiya dānaminnu sauryya
. © śrīrāmākucakūṭaghaṭṭita viśāḷō ra
lakṣmī rāmāramaṇīyadakṣiṇabhujaṁ kīrtyaṅganāra
kalikālakānanasurakṣōṇīja nendu rvvarābhā
dātta nadhikaṁ śrīraṭṭanārāyaṇaṁ . Ele vairi
ya vadhūśrōṇīkaṭīsūtramaṁ lalitōrōja su
ktrābjakāśmīramaṁ caḷanētrāṁjanamaṁ lalāṭatiḷa
ḷitaṁ māḍuvo ḍaṇna kāṇbudadaṟiṁ śrī raṭṭamārtta
dirānta virōdhige rāmacaṁdraneṁbudu baḷa bha
vainatēyaneṁbudu baḷavairiyeṁbudu
budu kalikarṇnaneṁbuda nē neṁbudu
ntavaṁge javanannane bēḍi guptananna
sadiṁde bhīmanannane diṁ va
nōṁtirppu dattā
dragaja sā
kīrtti Below this are
Digital edition of SII 11.74 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
